categories_system_owner_check.name: categories_system_owner_check
categories_system_owner_check.value: ("categories"."is_system" = true and "categories"."household_id" is null and "categories"."created_by_user_id" is null) or ("categories"."is_system" = false and "categories"."household_id" is not null and "categories"."created_by_user_id" is not null)
